div.p: Equip your team with the knowledge and skills to fully leverage Odoo—through structured training programs covering functional workflows and technical development.

li.span: Odoo Training

div.h2: Bridging the Skills Gap for Odoo Success
div.p: Most Odoo implementations underperform not because of the software, but because teams aren't trained properly. At Creyox Technologies, our Odoo training services bridge that gap with structured, role-based, hands-on programs built for real business environments.
Whether you're an end-user navigating daily tasks, a developer building custom modules, or a manager overseeing operations we have the right Odoo ERP training for you.

div.h2: Our Odoo Training By The Numbers

div.class: milestone-grid d-flex flex-wrap flex-lg-nowrap justify-content-center gap-3 gap-lg-4

div.p: Professionals Trained
Years of Odoo Expertise
& Technical Modules
Delivery
Certified Odoo Trainers

div.h2: What Your Team Will Be Able to Do After Training

span.style: background: rgba(67, 97, 238, 0.1); color: #4361ee; padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 30px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.9rem;

div.h3: After Odoo Functional Training, your team will be able to:

ul.style: list-style-type: none; padding-left: 0; margin-top: 15px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;

li.style: font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4b5563; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Process sales orders, purchase orders, and invoices independently in Odoo

li.style: font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4b5563; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Manage inventory movements, stock adjustments, and warehouse operations without IT help

li.style: font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4b5563; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Generate and interpret business reports, dashboards, and analytics

li.style: font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4b5563; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Configure and use CRM pipelines to track leads and close deals

li.style: font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4b5563; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Handle HR workflows, leave approvals, payroll processing, and employee records

li.style: font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4b5563; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Set up and manage projects, tasks, and timesheets inside Odoo

span.style: background: rgba(67, 97, 238, 0.1); color: #4361ee; padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 30px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.9rem;

div.h3: After Odoo Technical Training, your developers will be able to:

ul.style: list-style-type: none; padding-left: 0; margin-top: 15px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;

li.style: font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4b5563; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Build custom Odoo modules from scratch following Odoo's MVC architecture

li.style: font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4b5563; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Write Python models, views, and controllers within the Odoo framework

li.style: font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4b5563; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Create custom QWeb reports and dynamic dashboards

li.style: font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4b5563; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Integrate external systems and third-party APIs with Odoo via REST/JSON-RPC

li.style: font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4b5563; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Apply security rules, access rights, and record rules across custom modules

li.style: font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4b5563; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Debug, test, and deploy Odoo customizations in production environments

span.style: background: rgba(67, 97, 238, 0.1); color: #4361ee; padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 30px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.9rem;

div.h3: After Odoo ERP Training, your organization will be able to:

ul.style: list-style-type: none; padding-left: 0; margin-top: 15px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;

li.style: font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4b5563; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Run end-to-end business processes entirely within Odoo from lead to cash

li.style: font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4b5563; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Reduce dependency on manual spreadsheets and disconnected tools

li.style: font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4b5563; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Standardize workflows across departments with consistent Odoo usage

li.style: font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4b5563; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Onboard new employees faster using documented, trained internal processes

li.style: font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4b5563; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Measure business performance using live Odoo dashboards and KPI reports

div.p: Choose the training program designed specifically for your organization's roles and technical capabilities.
Master Odoo standard applications and operations without custom code

div.div: Business users, department managers, operations leads, and administrators.
None. Basic understanding of standard business processes is helpful.
Configuring Odoo parameters, setting up rules, and mastering daily workflows.
Sales, CRM, Purchase, Inventory, Accounting, Manufacturing, and HR.
Full independence in managing standard Odoo configurations and daily processes.
Advanced Odoo ERP administration workshops and sandbox coaching.

div.p: Dive deep into Odoo's framework, Python ORM, and custom development

div.div: Software developers, IT administrators, and technical architects.
Solid Python programming foundation and familiarity with XML & databases.
Building custom modules, modifying schema fields, and server automation.
Odoo ORM APIs, QWeb reporting, Javascript Owl framework, and Git workflow.
Absolute capability to develop custom applications, extensions, and custom APIs.
Our dedicated Odoo support plans for continuous developer mentorship.

div.p: Our Odoo training services are structured around your team's actual roles, daily workflows, and business goals.

Perfect for business users, department leads, and operations staff. This track covers how to use Odoo's core modules effectively from Sales and CRM to Inventory, Accounting, Purchase, and HR. You'll learn how to configure workflows, generate reports, and manage day-to-day operations without relying on technical support.

Designed for developers and IT professionals who want to build, extend, and customize Odoo. This track dives into module development, ORM, QWeb, XML-RPC/JSON-RPC APIs, Python backend logic, and Odoo's development framework. You'll leave with the skills to turn business requirements into working Odoo solutions.

A comprehensive Odoo ERP training program that covers how your entire business operates within Odoo across departments, approval flows, reporting hierarchies, and integrated processes. Ideal for businesses going live with Odoo or switching from another ERP system.
We start by understanding your team's current Odoo knowledge, your business processes, and your training goals. This ensures every session is relevant, not generic.
We build a customized training plan aligned to your industry, the Odoo modules you use, and the roles of your participants. No filler content just what your team needs.

Our Expert Odoo trainers deliver sessions packed with live demos, guided exercises, and real scenarios from your industry. After training, we provide continued support to answer questions and reinforce learning.

div.h2: Why Businesses Choose Creyox for Odoo Training

div.style: padding: 25px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.02);
div.h4: Certified Trainers with Real Project Experience
div.p: Our trainers don't just teach Odoo they've implemented it across industries. Every session comes with real-world context, not just textbook theory.

div.style: padding: 25px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.02);
div.p: We tailor training exercises and case studies to your industry whether you're in manufacturing, retail, services, or distribution.

div.style: padding: 25px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.02);
div.p: Every participant gets hands-on access to a dedicated Odoo instance for practice with no risk to your live data.

div.style: padding: 25px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.02);
div.p: We offer continued mentoring, Q&A support, and refresher sessions.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex: 0.8 !important;

div.h2: Trained by People Who've Actually Implemented Odoo

div.p: There's a meaningful difference between a trainer who has studied Odoo and one who has deployed it across dozens of real businesses. Our every trainer on our team brings both formal Odoo Expert and hands-on implementation experience across live projects.

ul.style: list-style-type: none; padding-left: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;

li.style: color: #4b5563; font-size: 1.05rem; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: 5+ years of active Odoo implementation and consulting experience

li.style: color: #4b5563; font-size: 1.05rem; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Odoo Expert professionals across functional and technical domains

li.style: color: #4b5563; font-size: 1.05rem; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Hands-on experience across Odoo versions 14, 15, 16, 17, 18 and 19 Community and Enterprise

li.style: color: #4b5563; font-size: 1.05rem; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Delivered 200+ training sessions across industries including manufacturing, retail, services, and distribution

li.style: color: #4b5563; font-size: 1.05rem; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Fluent in translating complex Odoo concepts into practical, role-specific skills

li.style: color: #4b5563; font-size: 1.05rem; display: flex; align-items: start;
li.span: Based in India, serving clients across the Middle East, Europe and globally

div.class: partner-image-box border-0 bg-transparent d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center

div.h2: Odoo Modules Covered in Our Training
div.p: Our Odoo software training programs cover the full breadth of Odoo's application suite:

div.h2: Odoo Training Tailored to Your Industry

p.style: font-size: 1.2rem; color: #4b5563; max-width: 800px; margin: 20px auto 0 auto;

div.p: We adapt every training program to reflect the workflows, terminology, and challenges of your specific industry.

div.style: background: rgba(67, 97, 238, 0.03); padding: 25px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05);

div.p: Training covers MRP, work orders, bill of materials, quality control, and shop floor operations with exercises built around manufacturing-specific Odoo scenarios.

div.style: background: rgba(67, 97, 238, 0.03); padding: 25px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05);

div.p: Learn how to manage point-of-sale operations, product catalogs, online orders, customer loyalty, and multi-channel inventory from a single Odoo environment.

div.style: background: rgba(67, 97, 238, 0.03); padding: 25px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05);

div.p: Focus on project management, timesheets, client billing, subscription contracts, and service delivery workflows the Odoo modules that matter most to services businesses.

div.style: background: rgba(67, 97, 238, 0.03); padding: 25px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05);

div.p: Deep dives into multi-warehouse management, vendor management, purchase planning, landed costs, and multi-currency operations for businesses dealing in goods at scale.

div.style: background: rgba(67, 97, 238, 0.03); padding: 25px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05);

div.p: Training on appointment scheduling, patient records, invoicing, inventory management for medical supplies, and HIPAA-relevant access configurations in Odoo.

div.style: background: rgba(67, 97, 238, 0.03); padding: 25px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05);

div.p: Learn how to manage student enrollment, course scheduling, fee collection, HR, and communications using Odoo's modular suite
